name: Portable Office
description:
SAMAN builds fifteen portable office cabin types, from a ₹1,85,000 single-desk unit up to a ₹43,55,000 multi-room block — so the real question isn't what a portable office is, it's which one fits your team, your site and your budget. This page maps every unit to the job it does best and shows each one's starting price, so you can shortlist before you call. Every cabin is factory-built on a mild-steel frame and delivered ready to use.

Which portable office fits your team: one desk, a site office, or a multi-room block?

Most buyers arrive sure they want a portable office but unsure which size and build. Sort by how many people work inside and where it sits. Single desk or a two-person cabin → the compact small office cabin is the entry unit, and ready stock office cabins ship pre-built when you can't wait for a build. Need it dispatched fast against a deadline? Stock units kept for quick despatch move soonest. A site office that takes daily use → the general-purpose office cabin is the all-rounder; the mild-steel-frame office cabin steps up frame grade for long-duration factory and project sites; and a container-form portable office suits rougher ground and crane placement. Frequent relocation → the single-piece prefab mobile office travels and re-sites as one finished unit. Factory-finished with documentation → choose the prefabricated portable office cabin for a single documented build, prefabricated office cabins for a multi-unit batch on one project, or the premium prefab portable office for a higher finish. A polished client-facing or executive space → the modern office cabin carries the premium interior, and the flagship portable office is the top single-unit spec. Room to grow, or a full building → start compact with the expandable modular office cabin and add rooms later; scale to a double-decker modular portable office; or take the largest multi-room office block for a full team footprint.

Portable office cabin types, sizes and starting prices compared

This portable office cabin price list sets the starting figure for each unit. Footprint is shown as a tier; exact dimensions are configured per order.
Product Best for Footprint From
Small Office Cabin Single desk, one-person office Compact ₹1,85,000
Portable Office Container Container-form, rough ground Standard ₹2,55,000
Modular Portable Office Cabin Compact, expand later Compact ₹2,75,000
Buy Portable Office Cabin Stock unit, fast despatch Standard ₹2,85,000
Prefabricated Portable Office Cabin Documented factory build Standard ₹3,15,000
Prefabricated Office Cabins Multi-unit batch order Standard ₹3,45,000
Portable Office Cabin General all-rounder Standard ₹3,75,000
MS Portable Office Cabin Long-duration, heavy use Standard ₹3,85,000
Prefab Mobile Office Frequent relocation Standard ₹3,85,000
Readymade Office Cabin Pre-built from stock Large ₹4,25,000
Modern Office Cabin Premium client-facing finish Standard ₹4,55,000
Prefab Portable Office Higher-spec prefab Large ₹5,15,000
Portable Office Flagship single unit Large ₹6,35,000
Modular Portable Office Double-decker, large team Multi-level ₹25,25,000
Modular Office Cabin Full multi-room block Multi-room ₹43,55,000
Starting prices are current SAMAN list prices; the final figure depends on size, panel grade and fit-out, and exact dimensions are shown on each product page.

How much does a portable office cost in India?

A portable office cabin in India costs between ₹1,85,000 and ₹43,55,000 from SAMAN, set mainly by which unit you choose. A compact single-desk cabin sits at the entry point, a fitted site office or modern cabin is mid-range, and a multi-room modular block sits at the top. Size, panel grade and interior fit-out decide the final figure.

Buying your portable office range from a manufacturer, not a reseller

Many portable office listings online are resellers and aggregators quoting a vague per-square-foot rate. SAMAN is a portable office cabin manufacturer: every unit is fabricated in-house on a mild-steel frame with insulated PUF panels, so the ₹1,85,000 entry cabin and the ₹43,55,000 multi-room block share the same structural standard. Ordering the full range from one maker means a single point for customisation, consistent build quality across several units on the same project, and one delivery and after-sales contact. Units are built to your floor area and fit-out and delivered across South India and Delhi NCR. For the full specification of the standard unit and how it ships, see the portable office overview.

Portable office range — common buyer questions

What's the difference between a portable office cabin and a container office?

A portable office cabin is a lighter mild-steel-framed unit for small-to-mid teams, flat ground and shorter-to-medium durations. A container office uses heavier ISO shipping-container steel that stacks and crane-lifts for rough industrial sites — if that's your requirement, see our container office range.

Is SAMAN a portable office manufacturer or a reseller?

SAMAN fabricates every unit in-house rather than reselling, so the same build standard runs from the entry cabin to the multi-room block, with customisation, quality and after-sales under one contact.

How much does a portable office cost, and is the starting price the final price?

The range runs from ₹1,85,000 to ₹43,55,000. The "from" figure is the base starting price; the final quote depends on size, panel grade, fit-out and any plumbing or electrical additions. Each product page lists its own starting point.

What's the difference between the modular, prefab, MS and readymade options?

Modular units connect and expand later; prefab and prefabricated units arrive factory-finished as a complete build; MS denotes a heavier mild-steel frame for long-duration use; and readymade ships pre-built from existing stock for the fastest setup.

Get your portable office quote

Tell us your team size, site location and how long you need it — we'll point you to the right unit with an exact price. Bangalore — Call +91 80886 85440 / WhatsApp +91 88616 22859 Delhi NCR — Call +91 87960 39938 / WhatsApp +91 97089 89937
